title: n8n expression sandbox escape via reserved-variable shadowing / with statement leading to RCE
description: n8n evaluates user-supplied workflow expressions through a sanitizing AST transform (PrototypeSanitizer in expression-sandboxing.ts) that is meant to keep evaluation inside a restricted sandbox. The sanitizer only inspected class declarations, member expressions and object-pattern destructuring, but did not prevent an expression from redeclaring the internal reserved identifiers used by the sandbox (the injected data node ___n8n_data and the __sanitize helper) via variable declarations, function parameters or catch clauses, and did not block 'with' statements. An authenticated user able to create or edit a workflow could craft an expression that shadows these internal variables or uses a 'with' block to defeat the property-access sanitization, escaping the sandbox and executing arbitrary code (RCE) with the privileges of the n8n process.
